title: Protein Sequence Classification Kaggle Competition
subtitle: THE CHINESE UNIVERSITY OF HONG KONG: Course Assignment
descr: • Applied pretrained ProtTrans transformer model and trained a fully-connected classifier head in Python
• Achieved 98.438% accuracy on public leaderboard and 94.161% accuracy on private leaderboard

title: Image Segmentation Project
subtitle: Self Project
descr: • Trained a U-Net model for semantic segmentation from scratch on the Cityscape dataset and Carvana dataset
• Applied pre-trained YOLO-v5 model for real-time tracking of cars
• Self-implemented an instance label assigning function based on maximum overlap to stablize the labelled id on each car moving across frames.

title: Deep Q-Learning Shooter Game Project “SnowFight”
subtitle: THE CHINESE UNIVERSITY OF HONG KONG: Course Assignment
descr: • Created a Gym environment of a simple third-person shooter game in Python Led the project and planned an efficient work schedule, while collaborating closely with groupmate throughout the development
• Implemented a simple Deep-Q Network with PyTorch to train agents to master at the game
• Fine-tuned the hyperparameters of the agent, achieving average kill streak of 30x and lengthend the survival duration by 4 times from the random baseline.

title: Calendar App Project “Oasis”
subtitle: Self Project
descr: • Independently developed a mobile event planning and notification application for Android using Java, aiming to help users track their deadlines and events
• Migrated the data storage and retrieval to the more robust RoomDatabase
• Refactored codebase into distinct UI layers and business logic components
